findings.description: Generated adversarial borderline compliance cases for manual review

adversarial_cases.text: We hope to resolve this matter before it escalates to a point where further action may be necessary. Please contact us to discuss your options.
Our system has flagged your account for review. We need to gather more information to assist you effectively. Please respond at your earliest convenience.
adversarial_cases.expected_violation: lack of clear identification as AI

adversarial_cases.text: We understand that times can be tough, but we encourage you to prioritize resolving this debt. Ignoring it may lead to more stress down the line.

findings.action_taken: Logged for review. Compliance checker patterns may need updating.
